message:
feat(visualization): add reduced-motion support and cache-bust SQLite URL

Add PREFERS_REDUCED_MOTION media query check and a LAB_EFFECTS utility
object with a logOnce helper to support accessible animation control in
the FrankenSQLite specs evolution visualization. Also cache-bust the
SQLite URL parameter (?v=2) to ensure browsers fetch the latest version.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
